sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْمَشْيُ نَشَاطًا بَدَنِيًّا مُفِيدًا لِلْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Hodanje se smatra fizičkom aktivnošću korisnom za srce.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is considered a physical activity beneficial for the heart.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِمُمَارَسَةِ الرِّيَاضَةِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju bavljenje sportom u trajanju od trideset minuta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise practicing sports for thirty minutes daily.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الْإِنْسَانُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَالطَّاقَةِ بَعْدَ التَّمَارِينِ الصَّبَاحِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek osjeća sreću i energiju nakon jutarnjih vježbi.
sentences.translationEn: A person feels happiness and energy after morning exercises.
